findings.summary: Spurious 'zones not filled' warning fires on a design with no copper zones
findings.details: The PCB has zone_count=0 (no copper fill zones defined), yet copper_presence emits the warning 'No filled polygon data — zones may not have been filled. Run Edit > Fill All Zones (B) in KiCad and re-save.' The warning is only meaningful when zones exist but have not been filled; it should be suppressed when zone_count is zero.
